entry.title: Love Me (Not Too Hard)
entry.summary:
Author: thatsanovelidea

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 28,783Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 101

Summary: It was a shitshow, to say the least. Despite, what he’d told Bobby all those months ago, he did not have a handle on the problem. He had the opposite. He had zero handles, and he was too embarrassed to bring it up. It was definitely an issue, but it wasn’t too serious. And it didn’t affect anybody besides himself. But it was definitely affecting him in a bad way. Hard day at work? Go have sex to feel better. Bobby yell at him for screwing up again? Find an old guy to tell him he’s good for something. See a happy family on a call and remember he hasn’t spoken to Maddie in seven years? Blackout so he doesn’t have to be reminded of that gaping wound. It was really bad. Yeah. But like, privately bad. Secretly bad. Except for his roommates, who were starting to get pissed about him stumbling around drunk with his guests. So, he started to look for a new apartment in earnest. And just when he was starting to think things were getting actually concerning, and pretty soon he wouldn’t even remember what the point of anything was, who walked into the fire station, looking perfect and attractive and ready to change Buck’s life? Eddie fucking Diaz.   or: Buck's sex addiction taken seriously.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Finding Those Lost
entry.summary:
Author: Not_Ren_42

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 54,927Chapters: 14/24Kudos: 456

Summary: Evangaline ‘Buck’ Buckley has made a home for herself in LA. After the long and difficult path to get here, she doesn’t think there is much left to surprise her. She has a new family, her son is thriving, and she’s loving her work as a firefighter. So what if sometimes the dark still comes for her some nights?When a new firefighter starts at the station, everything Buck thought she knew is thrown up in the air as she tries to keep her past and private life together. Things only get worse when dispatch starts messing the whole station around. -+- A season 2 rewrite that won't make much sense unless you've read part 1. New chapter every Friday :)

entry.title: A Year In The Life
entry.summary:
Author: Luna_Fics

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,801Chapters: 17/365Kudos: 51

Summary: 365 Days. 365 Moments. One year to go from best friends to husbands. I'm tackling a 365 day challenge, bringing you a year in the life of Buddie! Every day gets a new chapter on the quiet everyday little moments that slowly shift their relationship and change absolutely everything. I’ve been working on this for ages and already have the first four months completely pre written, so you can expect super consistent daily updates. If I miss a day, I'll keep it going. It will not be abandoned. But I should hit the daily targets 🤞 Most of the story stays with Buck and Eddie, but we will get a few other characters witnessing things, and scenes between Buck and Eddie and other characters. . It's going to be a year of small moments between Buck and Eddie.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Photography Takes An Instant Out Of Time, Altering Life By Holding It Still
entry.summary:
Author: Princessn97

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,823Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 10

Summary: Chris finds an old photo of his dad that gives him a bad gut feeling. After some googling, he accidentally flips their day upside down. Eddie can put up with a lot of shit, but he will tear into anyone who tries to hurt his son.

entry.title: I don't know what I do if something happened to you
entry.summary:
Author: CarpeDiem911

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 38,433Chapters: 13/13Kudos: 314

Summary: Bobby’s last words leave Buck lost in grief and guilt, slowly pulling him inward.As he retreats, Eddie is left on the outside, grasping for a connection that keeps slipping through his fingers.Sometimes, distance hurts more than loss.And sometimes, it takes everything breaking apart to bring two people back together.

entry.title: The WikiHow of Our Lives
entry.summary:
Author: Rdh

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,385Chapters: 1/3Kudos: 10

Summary: Buck is just trying to watch a raccoon steal a churro at 3 AM. Somehow, this results in a WikiHow video about how to tell if your husband is gay, a mild existential crisis, and the sudden realization that Eddie Diaz has been occupying a suspicious amount of real estate in his brain. That feels… inconvenient.   or, like Buck, I also doom scrolled (at a slightly more reasonable time) and watched this video and immediately thought of Eddie.

entry.title: The Family We Chose
entry.summary:
Author: Pnk_strawberry1

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 82,105Chapters: 17/18Kudos: 371

Summary: Evan Buckley was truly fucked. One week after leaving the only home he’d ever known, his parents’ house—Ground Zero hit, and the world went to hell. Eight months later, he’s still searching for his sister Maddie in Los Angeles, armed only with a tear-stained note: “I’m leaving Doug. I’m going to Los Angeles.” When Buck finally tracks her to Safe Zone 118, he realizes that maybe having a family and surviving alongside people who actually care, isn’t so bad. At 118, firefighter Eddie Diaz, a single dad, turned his fire station into a refuge with his team when Ground Zero struck. Just trying to keep his kids safe, he’s thrown for a loop when a stranger shows up claiming to be Maddie’s brother. Buck is skilled, prepared, and oddly magnetic, forcing Eddie to question everything he thought he knew about survival, trust, and maybe even… something more.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Gravity
entry.summary:
Author: Second_starr

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,446Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 155

Summary: Six months since Theo was placed with Buck, everyone at the station already acts like Buck and Eddie are married. Shared calendars. Matching emergency contacts. Family dinners. Buck laughs it off, until Ravi casually asks: “So when did you know you were in love with Eddie?” And Buck doesn’t have an answer. Because the worst part is he genuinely doesn’t know when it happened. Only that it already has.

entry.title: The Minute That Wouldn’t End
entry.summary:
Author: lako

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 53,472Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 171

Summary: A deeply tired, ugly little part of Eddie wanted to know what would happen if he simply sat down on the apparatus floor and bled through his shirt. Would they notice then? Or would he have to actually pass out first? He hated that thought as soon as he had it. It wasn’t fair. They loved Buck because Buck was lovable, because he was family, because he had just been kidnapped and tortured and dragged through hell. Eddie loved him too. Maybe more than was good for him. Certainly more than was wise. And if Eddie had made himself harder to care for, then that wasn’t on them. Note: Now that we’ve survived the finale, I’ve decided to change part of my story and shift the flow a little. So to my loyal readers — you may want to start rereading from Chapter 9 so everything connects better from there.

entry.title: held on the delicate brink [9x18 missing scenes]
entry.summary:
Author: InsightfulInsomniac

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,841Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 107

Summary: Logically, Buck knows that Chim and Hen could transfer Eddie to the gurney. He knows that both them and the staff might also have ideas of how to move him properly, but he trembles with the need to do something. The elevator doors haven’t dug into his back again, so he needs to use his strength to help Eddie in some other way. Besides, no matter how much Hen and Chimney love Eddie, they’ve never held his body on the delicate brink of death. That’s intimacy that only Buck gets to know. “I’ve got him, I’ve got him.” Buck rushes out, folding his body between Hen and Chim. Eddie’s eyes are half-open and unfocused, but his head lolls towards him as soon as he’s by his side. “Hen, Chim, I –” “Go, Buck.” Chim urges with a nod, pulling his hand away from Eddie’s neck. ****** Entirely canon-compliant 9x18 "missing scenes" to fill in the gaps between when the 118 discovers Eddie in the elevator and when he is out of surgery with Buck at his bedside. Light angst, Buck introspection, and overt buddie feelings galore.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Calling (It's a Choice)
entry.summary:
Author: Will_of_Alexander

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,196Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 111

Summary: Ever since the Diaz boys moved to El Paso, Buck has been estranged from their lives. Eddie first, and then Christopher. He's lived a lot since then. Gotten married, had a kid, gotten divorced. But the second his phone rings with the name "Chris 🦖" Buck knows something is wrong. Will he take the call? Will it become his calling? Does he even have a choice?

entry.title: Don't be homophobic Madison
entry.summary:
Author: pineapplehazard

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 36,515Chapters: 23/?Kudos: 584

Summary: Eddie : His posture was horrible!! And he WAS NOT on rythmBut because he managed to lift her twice without letting her fall that deserves 7s??? Maddie : WowWhat kind of monster did I create...?  Eddie :UghSee that's why I didn't want to watch this showIt's giving me flashbacks Maddie : Flashbacks?? 😳Flashbacks of what EXACTLY?? EDDIEEDMUNDOANSWER ME Eddie : I'll tell youBut Buck can't know about this ok?  Maddie : OMG a secret Buck doesn't know!!! 😵 Eddie : Don't make me regret it. Maddie :I'm not afraid of you 🔫Spill.  Eddie : I... I used to be a ballroom dancing champion?  Maddie : WHAAAAAAAAAAT🫵🤨 = 🕺? ________________ Eddie and Maddie finally start to interact just as Eddie is leaving for El Paso.Gossips, beef with Josh and matchmaking involved. (Canon until 8x13)

entry.title: Probable Cause (For Marriage…Apparently)
entry.summary:
Author: Firefawn

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,836Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 191

Summary: Eddie Diaz realizes he’s bisexual at approximately 11:30 PM. By 9:14 AM the next morning, he has:- Dumped his girlfriend,- Proposed marriage to Buck,_ Emotionally compromised an entire fire engine,- Held Buck hostage in radiology, and- Turned a Level 1 Trauma Center into a live studio audience. The thing is, Buck would’ve handled this better if Eddie had:- NOT proposed marriage in the middle of a gas leak,- NOT immediately started flirting like a menace,- NOT weaponized ER paperwork,- NOT trapped him in a CT room,- NOT weaponized eye contact,- NOT somehow become hotter in a hospital gown, and- NOT had an entire emergency department acting as witnesses. Evan Buckley, is, in a word, doomed.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: You're A Liability (You're A Little Much For Me)
entry.summary:
Author: JustAnotherWriterInTheDark

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,169Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 31

Summary: After the tsunami hit LA ,Buck is having a hard time trusting himself again. He feels like he is slowly slipping trough the cracks and he is doing it all alone. All he wants is to go back to his family, to be a part of the team again, to be where he belongs. But what if they don’t want him back? What if they don’t trust him either?…This is my take on how I think the tsunami-and-Buck-suing-the-department storyline would have effected him and his relationship with Eddie, Chris and the 118. I often feel like they should have made Buck suffer more in the aftermath. (sorry not sorry) Oh also I scratched the whole underground fighting storyline because it gives me the ick. (gave Eddie something else to cry about though) xx

entry.title: Pushing it down and praying (except not the first one anymore)
entry.summary:
Author: bisexuallywritten

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,898Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 15

Summary: After Athena gets shot, Eddie is panicking in the hospital unsure of what to do. He goes to the chapel to help figure it out. Based on the still of Eddie kneeling at the alter in 9x18
